summary:
The agent correctly identifies that the provided evidence pertains only to drug structures and pharmacological properties, with no connection to evolutionary genetics or functional constraints of synonymous site variations. Consequently, it is impossible to assess whether synonymous sites in primates and rodents are functionually constrained using this data set.  

\boxed{B}
